meta.title: PYB3DCP — Print Your Building | Yemen's first 3D concrete printing company
meta.description: PYB3DCP is Yemen's first company specialized in 3D concrete printing. We turn ideas into tangible projects with advanced technology, custom design, and rapid delivery.

hero.headline: Turning ideas into tangible projects
hero.subtitle: Yemen's first company specialized in smart construction and 3D concrete printing.

stats.title: Numbers that reflect your trust
stats.subtitle: We build the future with real numbers — and tangible projects.

about.title: Yemen's first smart construction specialist
about.intro: PYB3DCP is a pioneer in 3D concrete printing in Yemen. We deliver innovative, sustainable solutions for the construction sector, turning creative ideas into tangible projects — at high quality, in record time.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.body: Empower Yemen's construction sector through advanced 3D printing technology and deliver smart, sustainable building solutions that meet our clients' needs with excellence and efficiency.

vision.title: Our vision
vision.body: To become the leading 3D concrete printing company in Yemen and the region, and to contribute to a better future through smart, sustainable construction.

items.title: Innovation
items.body: Always pursuing innovative solutions in step with the latest global technologies.

items.title: Quality
items.body: Uncompromising quality standards across every phase of execution.

items.title: Sustainability
items.body: We believe in sustainable construction and reducing environmental impact.

items.title: Professionalism
items.body: A specialist team of engineers and experts at your service.

items.title: Advanced technology
items.body: We use globally certified 3D printing technologies to deliver the highest precision and quality on every project.

items.title: Custom design
items.body: Unique designs tailored to each project — fully customizable to match your vision and goals.

items.title: Fast delivery
items.body: We commit to tight, realistic timelines — saving time and cost compared to traditional construction.

services.title: Integrated smart construction
services.subtitle: From idea to handover, we deliver end-to-end services that cover every angle of your project.

items.title: 3D concrete printing
items.body: State-of-the-art 3D concrete printing services, capable of executing complex designs impossible with traditional methods — at top quality in less time.

items.title: Custom project design
items.body: A team of specialist engineers and architects designs your project around your needs and vision — balancing aesthetics and function.

items.title: Specialist engineering consulting
items.body: Expert consultancy in smart construction and 3D printing to help you make the right calls on your project.

items.title: Maintenance & restoration
items.body: Maintenance and restoration services powered by 3D printing — extending the life of structures and improving their performance.

projects.title: Projects that speak for themselves
projects.subtitle: Drag horizontally to browse selected work.

items.name: Ali Saeed
items.quote: Working with PYB3DCP was exceptional. They brought innovative solutions and a speed of delivery that exceeded our expectations.

items.name: Sarah Mohammed
items.quote: Design precision and execution professionalism. I recommend them for any project that needs modern construction techniques.

items.name: Reda Ali
items.quote: 3D printing saved us real time and cost. The team is professional, and their post-delivery support is excellent.

items.name: Lamia Yousef
items.quote: My dream home came to life — high quality and unique design. Thank you to the PYB3DCP team for their creativity and commitment.

items.a: 3D concrete printing, custom project design, specialist engineering consulting, and maintenance & restoration of structures.

items.q: How do you ensure print quality?
items.a: We rely on the latest 3D printing technology, and every phase of execution undergoes strict quality control for precision and consistency.
Yes. We deliver fully custom solutions tailored to each project and client — from design through handover.

cta.title: Have a project that needs 3D printing?
cta.subtitle: Message us today and our team will reach out within 24 hours.
